languages.text: "Соберите великое жертвенное шествие псайкеров со всего протектората и отправьте на одну из полярных шапок. Пусть Погонщицы отправятся туда — это займет их надолго".

traits.locale_text: "Соберите великое жертвенное шествие псайкеров со всего протектората и отправьте на одну из полярных шапок. Пусть Погонщицы отправятся туда — это займет их надолго".

languages.text: "Assemble a grand sacrificial procession of psykers from across the protectorate and dispatch them to one of the polar ice caps. Let the Drovers follow them there — that should keep them busy for quite some time."
languages.original_text: "Соберите великое жертвенное шествие псайкеров со всего протектората и отправьте на одну из полярных шапок. Пусть Погонщицы отправятся туда — это займет их надолго".

traits.locale_text: "Assemble a grand sacrificial procession of psykers from across the protectorate and dispatch them to one of the polar ice caps. Let the Drovers follow them there. It shall occupy them for a considerable time."

"Assemble a grand sacrificial procession of psykers from across the protectorate and dispatch them to one of the polar ice caps. Let the Drovers follow them there — that should keep them busy for quite some time."
"Gather the Psykers and send them to one of the poles. Lure the Drovers there — it will keep them busy for a long time."

"Assemble a grand sacrificial procession of psykers from across the protectorate and dispatch them to one of the polar ice caps. Let the Drovers follow them there. It shall occupy them for a considerable time."

"Assemble a grand sacrificial procession of psykers from across the protectorate and dispatch them to one of the polar ice caps. Let the Drovers follow them there — that should keep them busy for quite some time."

languages.text: 「サイカーを集めて、極のどちらかに送る。そして、ドルーバーを誘い込む。そうすれば、彼らは長い間、そこで忙しくなるだろう」
languages.original_text: "Gather the Psykers and send them to one of the poles. Lure the Drovers there — it will keep them busy for a long time."

traits.locale_text: 「サイカーを集めて、極のどちらかに送る。そして、ドルーバーを誘い込む。そうすれば、彼らは長い間、そこで忙しくなるだろう。」

languages.text: «Prepare una gran procesión de psíquicos de todo el protectorado para su sacrificio y envíelos a uno de los polos. Que los Pastores los sigan hasta allí; eso debería entretenerlos durante una buena temporada».
languages.original_text: "Assemble a grand sacrificial procession of psykers from across the protectorate and dispatch them to one of the polar ice caps. Let the Drovers follow them there — that should keep them busy for quite some time."

traits.locale_text: «Prepare una gran procesión de psíquicos de todo el protectorado para su sacrificio y envíelos a uno de los polos. Que los Pastores los sigan hasta allí; eso debería entretenerlos durante una buena temporada».

languages.text: “在整个属地征集灵能者，组建一支盛大的献祭队伍，然后把他们送往极地冰原。让拒生花追着他们去——这样够它们忙一阵子的了。”
languages.original_text: "Assemble a grand sacrificial procession of psykers from across the protectorate and dispatch them to one of the polar ice caps. Let the Drovers follow them there — that should keep them busy for quite some time."

traits.locale_text: “在整个属地征集灵能者，组建一支盛大的献祭队伍，然后把他们送往极地冰原。让拒生花追着他们去——这样够它们忙一阵子的了。”

languages.text: "Stellt eine große Opferprozession mit Psionikern aus allen Teilen des Protektorats zusammen und schickt sie zu einer der Polkappen. Die Treiber werden ihnen dorthin folgen ... das dürfte sie eine Weile beschäftigen."
languages.original_text: "Assemble a grand sacrificial procession of psykers from across the protectorate and dispatch them to one of the polar ice caps. Let the Drovers follow them there — that should keep them busy for quite some time."

traits.locale_text: "Stellt eine große Opferprozession mit Psionikern aus allen Teilen des Protektorats zusammen und schickt sie zu einer der Polkappen. Die Treiber werden ihnen dorthin folgen ... das dürfte sie eine Weile beschäftigen."

languages.text: "Protektoranın dört bir yanından ruhsezerlerden oluşan büyük bir kurban töreni hazırlansın. Onları kutup buzullarından birine gönderelim. Çobanlar onları oraya kadar takip etsin. Epey bir süre meşgul olacaklardır."
languages.original_text: "Assemble a grand sacrificial procession of psykers from across the protectorate and dispatch them to one of the polar ice caps. Let the Drovers follow them there — that should keep them busy for quite some time."

traits.locale_text: "Protektoranın dört bir yanından ruhsezerlerden oluşan büyük bir kurban töreni hazırlansın. Onları kutup buzullarından birine gönderelim. Çobanlar onları oraya kadar takip etsin. Epey bir süre meşgul olacaklardır."

languages.text: « Formez une grande procession sacrificielle de psykers provenant des quatre coins du protectorat et déployez-les vers l'une des calottes polaires. Laissez les Chasseurs les poursuivre... ça devrait les occuper un moment. »
languages.original_text: "Assemble a grand sacrificial procession of psykers from across the protectorate and dispatch them to one of the polar ice caps. Let the Drovers follow them there — that should keep them busy for quite some time."

traits.locale_text: « Formez une grande procession sacrificielle de psykers provenant des quatre coins du protectorat et déployez-les vers l'une des calottes polaires. Laissez les Chasseurs les poursuivre... ça devrait les occuper un moment. »
